THE TRIAL IS CONTINUED TO DEC-24-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR DISPOSITION AFTER THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING IS HELD. ORDER AND NOTICE WILL BE MAILED BY THE COURT.
